name: Invoice Processing Pipeline
outcome_goal: Process incoming invoices: read, extract data, validate against PO, get human review, enter into accounting

jobs.label: step_1_read_invoices
jobs.prompt:
## Objective
Read incoming invoices from the email inbox.

## Context
- [retrieval] Email inbox — filter for invoices and payment-related messages

## Expected Output
- invoice_documents: array of raw invoice text/images
- count: number of invoices found

## Done Criteria
- All unprocessed invoices retrieved
- No invoices skipped or duplicated

jobs.label: step_2_extract_fields
jobs.prompt:
## Objective
Extract vendor name, invoice amount, and due date from each invoice document.

## Context
- [document] Invoice documents from previous step

## Expected Output
- extracted_fields: Record<string, {vendor: string, amount: number, due_date: string, po_number: string}>
- confidence: number (0-1)

## Done Criteria
- All target fields extracted from every invoice
- Extraction confidence >= 0.85
- No fields contain placeholder or null values

jobs.label: step_3_validate_po
jobs.prompt:
## Validation Task
Validate the extracted invoice data against purchase orders.

## Rules to Check
- [required] Every invoice has a matching PO number in the system
- [threshold] Invoice amount within 5% of PO amount
- [required] Vendor name matches PO vendor
- [required] Due date is in the future

## Expected Output
- pass: boolean
- issues: string[] (empty if pass)
- discrepancies: array of {invoice_id, field, expected, actual}

jobs.label: step_4_enter_accounting
jobs.prompt:
## Objective
Enter validated and approved invoices into the accounting system.

## Context
- [schema] Accounting system entry format
- Only process invoices that passed validation

## Expected Output
- entries_created: number
- confirmation_ids: string[]

## Done Criteria
- All approved invoices entered
- No duplicate entries created
- Confirmation received for each entry
